title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a new feature by Anthropic that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tool supports prototype, slide deck, and template options, and outputs downloadable code for responsive web pages.
